appliedUpdates.description: Added 'api_start_test' command for starting the API with test environment variables.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that TDD is not strictly required for configuration fixes or pure framework wiring where scaffolding must exist before tests can be meaningfully written.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: api-jest-config-fix and api-health-and-cors both required procedure deviations from the TDD step because they were config/infra fixes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow skipping DDD layering (Entities, Use-Cases, Repositories) when the assigned feature is purely framework wiring (e.g., CORS, Swagger).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: api-health-and-cors deviated from the skill's DDD scaffolding process because it only required a HealthController and main.ts updates.

rejectedObservations.observation: Lint warnings for unused variables exist in the e2e validator specs.
Pre-existing unrelated untracked files were present in the working tree.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a known state from orchestrator/validators creating transcript_out.txt and validation states.
